title: audit — error codes
description: Audit-scoped error codes. Namespace: NOTIFICATIONS_AUDIT_* to match the notifications family convention. Every code maps to an HTTP status + retryability flag + user-facing bit + audit severity. Most codes fire against the retention-policy or export surfaces; the audit row itself has narrow error surface (immutable, no CRUD over HTTP).

errors.description: audit.capture kill switch is OFF OR audit_capture entitlement is revoked. Vendor observer is unbound; no audit rows write. Should NEVER be true in a normal-operating environment — a live compliance-officer alert fires + a security audit row is written for the disablement.

AuditObserver::creating detected null tenant_id. Defense-in-depth against vendor drift. Indicates a code path that produced an audit without our expected tenant context — a bug or a rogue direct-vendor call. Refuses the write + fires a security alert.

AuditObserver::creating received an event name outside the closed set (vendor defaults + registered custom events). Refuses the write + emits a compliance alert (typo in a custom event registration, or a rogue caller producing arbitrary event strings).

AuditObserver::updating throws. Audit rows are immutable after write. Someone tried to mutate an existing audit row via Eloquent save() or update(). Refused with a security-alert-level audit trail entry.
AuditObserver::deleting refuses because caller is not PurgeExpiredAuditsJob. Manual DELETE attempt on the audits table — fires a security alert.
audit.enforce_read_only middleware refused non-GET on a /audits* route. Belt-and-braces guard against rogue route registration.
Tenant lacks audit_retention_extended entitlement (Enterprise-only). AuditRetentionPolicy create/update refused. User-facing so tenant admin can request Enterprise upgrade.
Tenant already has an active AuditRetentionPolicy (deleted_at IS NULL). POST refused — caller must PATCH the existing policy or DELETE it first.
retention_years is not in [1..config.audit.retention.max_years]. Default max is 10.
override_starts_at >= override_ends_at (when override_ends_at is set). Dates are inconsistent.
override_reason failed the shape check (10-500 char non-empty string). Compliance officer must justify the retention override with a descriptive reason.
Tenant lacks audit_export entitlement (Medium+). Export via POST /api/v1/audits/export refused. Regulator export additionally requires audit_regulator_export (Enterprise) — separate error code below.
Tenant lacks audit_regulator_export entitlement (Enterprise-only). Regulator-shaped export refused.
Tenant hit the daily export rate limit (20/day baseline). Retry-after header points to next available window.
Export request estimated row count exceeds config.audit.export.max_rows_per_export (5M). Caller must chunk by date range or auditable_type.
audit:backfill-tenant-id refused because another backfill invocation is already running (distributed lock held). Retry after the current job completes.

Caller lacks audit.audits.reveal_raw_diff permission. The reveal is compliance-officer only + writes a chain-of-custody audit row on every successful reveal. This code fires on the refusal + fires a security alert (attempted diff-reveal by unprivileged caller).
byEntity filter references an auditable_type that does not resolve at boot (not a valid audited model class). Refused with 404.
